name: West Flemish

ancestors.notes: Low Franconian; West Flemish is written with Dutch-based spelling conventions.

notes: West Flemish (West-Vlams), a Low Franconian variety of Belgium, the Netherlands and French Flanders. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. West Flemish has no official orthography: it is written with ad-hoc adaptations of Dutch spelling that do not consistently mark its distinctive vowels, the h-dropping, or the /ɣ/→[h] shift. A Dutch-based grapheme map would mis-transcribe it, so no map is claimed here.

location.notes: Glottolog's representative point for Western Flemish.
